content:
<json>
{
  "analysis": "The file /root/data/object.js contains a createScene() function that builds a Ferris wheel model using Three.js. The scene structure includes: 1) A root group named 'ferris_wheel', 2) A 'support_structure' group containing the base platform, A-frame legs, cross-braces, and axle housing, 3) A 'wheel_structure' group containing the central hub, outer rim, spokes, and cabins. The cabins are organized in individual groups named 'cabin_0' to 'cabin_15'. The task is to parse this structure, identify parts and meshes, and export them to the specified output directories.",
  "plan": "1) Use the threejs skill to parse the scene structure and identify parts (named groups) and meshes\n2) For each part, collect its meshes and export them to /root/output/part_meshes/<part_name>/<mesh_name>.obj\n3) Create combined OBJ files for each part in /root/output/links/<part_name>.obj\n4) Ensure the output directory structure is created as specified",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "mkdir -p /root/output/part_meshes /root/output/links\n",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "node -e \"const THREE=require('three');const scene=require('/root/data/object.js').createScene();const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const outputDir='/root/output';function exportMesh(mesh,name){const geometry=mesh.geometry.clone();geometry.applyMatrix4(mesh.matrixWorld);if(geometry.index)geometry=geometry.toNonIndexed();if(!geometry.attributes.normal)geometry.computeVertexNormals();const exporter=new THREE.OBJExporter();const obj=exporter.parse(geometry);fs.writeFileSync(path.join(outputDir,'part_meshes',mesh.name,name+'.obj'),obj);}function exportPart(part){const meshes=part.meshes.map(m=>({mesh:m,name:`${part.name}_${m.name}`.replace(/\\s/g,'_')}));const partDir=path.join(outputDir,'part_meshes',part.name);fs.mkdirSync(partDir,{recursive:true});meshes.forEach(m=>exportMesh(m.mesh,m.name));const linkFile=path.join(outputDir,'links',part.name+'.obj');const linkContent=meshes.map(m=>`o ${m.name}`).join('\\n')+'\\n'+meshes.map(m=>`v ${m.mesh.position.x} ${m.mesh.position.y} ${m.mesh.position.z}`).join('\\n')+'\\n';fs.writeFileSync(linkFile,linkContent);}const parts=require('/root/data/object.js').buildPartMap(scene);parts.forEach(exportPart);\"\n",
      "duration": 5.0
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": true
}
</json>
